scripts.dev: concurrently -n protocol,cli,ext,site "pnpm --filter @flrande/bak-protocol dev" "pnpm --filter @flrande/bak-cli dev" "pnpm --filter @flrande/bak-extension dev" "pnpm --filter @flrande/bak-test-sites dev"
scripts.test:e2e:full: pwsh -NoLogo -NoProfile -File scripts/e2e/reset-method-status.ps1 && pnpm build && playwright test --reporter=line --output=test-results
scripts.release:publish: pnpm --filter @flrande/bak-protocol publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @flrande/bak-cli publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @flrande/bak-extension publish --access public --no-git-checks
